statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: A queue with an array-based implementation, where the front of the queue is at index 0 and the rear is at the last index.
statement.outputFormat: The element dequeued from the queue.
statement.notes: Note: You are not allowed to use the built-in queue library or data structure.
